articles.title: Report: Apple tops global smartphone market for first time in Q1 as overall shipments drop
articles.summary: Counterpoint Research has published its latest report on global smartphone shipments for Q1 2026, showing that strong demand for the iPhone 17 helped Apple take the top spot in the market for the first time in a first quarter. Here are the details. more…
articles.title_zh: 報告：Apple 在 Q1 首次登頂全球智慧型手機市場，整體出貨量下降
articles.summary_zh: Counterpoint Research 發布 Q1 2026 全球智慧型手機出貨量報告，顯示 iPhone 17 的強勁需求幫助 Apple 首次在第一季度佔據市場第一名。

articles.title: AI Mode in Google Search now helps you book restaurants in the UK
articles.summary: AI Mode in Google Search has received another new feature in the UK, following its initial rollout in the US last year. It can now book restaurants for you. You just need to describe what you're looking for, and list all of your needs and preferences. Google uses "find a table for two at a dog-friendly Italian restaurant in Shoreditch for Saturday at 7PM" as an example in the post announcing the new feature. There's also "find me a sushi restaurant nearby that has a table for four that also serves vegan tempura". You get the idea. AI Mode will show you a curated list of places to...
articles.title_zh: Google Search 中的 AI Mode 現已支援在英國預訂餐廳
articles.summary_zh: Google Search 的 AI Mode 在英國推出了新功能，可協助用戶預訂餐廳。用戶只需描述需求和偏好，Google 即可為您找到合適的餐廳。

articles.title: Motorola Edge 70 Pro and Razr 70 Ultra grab new certifications ahead of imminent unveiling
articles.summary: Yesterday was filled with a barrage of Motorola leaked renders, showing the Razr 70, Razr 70 Ultra, and the Edge 70 Pro. Today, the Edge 70 Pro and Razr 70 Ultra have been spotted in two separate certification databases. The Razr 70 Ultra with the model number XT2655-4 has been given the go-ahead in China by 3C. The certification reveals that it will have support for 68W wired charging. Incidentally, that's the same level as the Razr 60 Ultra, so there's no upgrade in this regard on the newer model. Meanwhile, the Edge 70 Pro with the model number XT2607-1 has bagged the TDRA...
articles.title_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro 和 Razr 70 Ultra 獲新認證，即將推出
articles.summary_zh: Motorola Edge 70 Pro 和 Razr 70 Ultra 已在認證資料庫中現身，Razr 70 Ultra（型號 XT2655-4）已獲得批准。

articles.title: How GNSS satellites power positioning and timing
articles.summary: From smartphones to cars to critical infrastructure, these early satellites power some of the most modern technologies of today GNSS is not a term that peppers media language often. Nevertheless, it underpins almost all technologies that we use in everyday…
articles.title_zh: GNSS 衛星如何驅動定位和授時
articles.summary_zh: 從智慧手機到汽車再到關鍵基礎設施，這些早期衛星為當今許多現代技術提供動力。GNSS 雖然不常見於媒體，但它支撐著我們日常使用的幾乎所有技術。

articles.title: Nvidia’s AI grid and the telco dilemma
articles.summary: Should telcos invest billions in edge GPU infrastructure or wait for physical AI use cases to mature? In sum – what we know: ABI Research recently put out an analysis looking at Nvidia’s AI grid concept and the bigger question…
articles.title_zh: Nvidia 的 AI 網格與電信運營商的困境
articles.summary_zh: 電信運營商應該投資數十億美元建設邊緣 GPU 基礎設施，還是等待 Physical AI 使用案例成熟？ABI Research 最近發布了一份分析，探討 Nvidia 的 AI 網格概念及其更廣泛的意義。

articles.title: Artemis II Returns From Historic Flight Around the Moon
articles.summary: After traveling a greater distance from Earth than any humans before them, the astronauts of Artemis II have safely returned home.
articles.title_zh: Artemis II 從歷史性的月球飛行中安全返回
articles.summary_zh: Artemis II的宇航員們在比之前任何人類都更遠離地球的地方旅行後，已經安全返回家園。

articles.title: Artemis II Safely Returns to Earth After Historic Moon Mission
articles.summary: NASA’s Artemis crew of four astronauts returned to Earth and splashed down in the Pacific Ocean, capping humanity’s first return to the moon in more than 50 years. (Source: Bloomberg)
articles.title_zh: Artemis II 在歷史性月球任務後安全返回地球
articles.summary_zh: NASA的Artemis四人機組在太平洋濺落，結束了人類50多年來首次重返月球的任務。

articles.title: Four astronauts are back home after a daring ride around the Moon
articles.summary: Slamming into the atmosphere at more than 30 times the speed of sound, NASA’s Orion spacecraft blazed a trail over the Pacific Ocean on Friday, returning home with four astronauts and safely capping humanity’s first voyage to the Moon in nearly 54 years. Temperatures outside the capsule builtup to some 5,000 degrees Fahrenheit as a sheath of plasma enveloped the Orion spacecraft, named Integrity , and its four long-distance travelers, temporarily blocking radio signals the Moon ship and Mission Control in Houston. Flying southwest to northeast, the spacecraft steered toward a splashdown zone southwest of San Diego, where a US Navy recovery ship held position to await the crew’s homecoming. Ground teams regained communications with Orion commander Reid Wiseman after a six-minute blackout. A
articles.title_zh: 四名宇航員在月球周圍的大膽飛行後返回家園
articles.summary_zh: NASA的Orion太空船以超音速30倍的速度衝入大氣層，在太平洋上空留下光芒軌跡，成功帶回四名宇航員，標誌著人類近54年來首次月球之旅的安全完成。

articles.title: Californians sue over AI tool that records doctor visits
articles.summary: Several Californians sued Sutter Health and MemorialCare this week over allegations that an AI transcription tool was used to record them without their consent, in violation of state and federal law. The proposed class-action lawsuit, filed on Wednesday in federal court in San Francisco, states that, within the past six months, the plaintiffs received medical care at various Sutter and MemorialCare facilities. During those visits, medical staff used Abridge AI. According to the complaint, this system “captured and processed their confidential physician-patient communications. Plaintiffs did not receive clear notice that their medical conversations would be recorded by an artificial intelligence platform, transmitted outside the clinical setting, or processed through third-party systems.” R
articles.title_zh: 加州人因錄製醫生會面的AI工具提起訴訟
articles.summary_zh: 數名加州居民本週對Sutter Health和MemorialCare提起訴訟，指控他們在未經同意的情況下使用AI轉錄工具進行錄製，違反了州和聯邦法律。

articles.title: App Store fight continues as Apple and Epic clash over court-ordered stay
articles.summary: Apple and Epic have filed new requests over whether the court should keep or lift a recent stay in their ongoing App Store legal battle. Here are the details. more…
articles.title_zh: App Store 爭訟持續 Apple 與 Epic 為法院命令的暫停令對簿公堂
articles.summary_zh: Apple 與 Epic 就是否應保持或解除其持續進行的 App Store 法律訴訟中的暫停令提交了新的請求。

articles.title: OpenAI says to update Mac apps including ChatGPT and Codex as security precaution
articles.summary: OpenAI is asking users of its Mac software to update to the latest releases from today “out of an abundance of caution.” This is due to a security issue with a third-party developer tool, Axios, that was used by OpenAI. more…
articles.title_zh: OpenAI 宣布更新 Mac 應用程式（包括 ChatGPT 和 Codex）以防範安全問題
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI 要求其 Mac 軟體使用者基於謹慎考量更新至最新版本，此舉係因為 OpenAI 使用的第三方開發工具存在安全問題。

articles.title: Apple Hires Uber’s Asia-Pacific Government Relations Chief
articles.summary: Apple Inc. has hired Uber Technologies Inc.’s head of public policy and government relations for Asia-Pacific as it looks to revamp its supply chains in the region.
articles.title_zh: Apple 聘請 Uber 亞太區政府關係主管

articles.title: Tecno Spark 50 Pro and Pova 8 battery capacities revealed
articles.summary: Tecno showcased the Pova 8 at MWC in Barcelona in early March, but the phone still isn't official. However, it has now been spotted in a TUV listing. This reveals the fact that it has a 7,750 mAh battery, much larger than its predecessor's 6,000 mAh cell. Tecno launched the Spark 50 5G in late March, but the Spark 50 Pro has yet to join it. That device has also been spotted in the TUV database, with a 5,800 mAh battery. While smaller than the Pova 8's, keep in mind that the Spark 40 Pro only has a 5,200 mAh battery. Tecno Pova 8 (left) and Spark 50 Pro (right) TUV listings So...
articles.title_zh: Tecno Spark 50 Pro 和 Pova 8 電池容量曝光
articles.summary_zh: Tecno Pova 8 在 TUV 認證中曝光，搭載 7,750 mAh 電池，相比前代的 6,000 mAh 大幅提升。Tecno 也在三月下旬推出了 Spark 50 5G。

articles.title: OpenAI Accuses Musk of ‘Ambush’ as $100 Billion-Plus Trial Looms
articles.summary: OpenAI says Elon Musk has suddenly changed direction on what he’s seeking in his lawsuit against the startup in a “legal ambush” just weeks before trial.
articles.title_zh: OpenAI指控馬斯克發動「突襲」之際 逾千億美元訴訟迫在眉睫
articles.summary_zh: OpenAI指控Elon Musk在距離審判僅數週之際，突然改變其對該新創公司訴訟的訴求方向，稱此舉為「法律突襲」。

articles.title: Japan Bets $16 Billion to Propel Startup Rapidus Into AI Chips
articles.summary: Japan approved ¥631.5 billion ($4 billion) in additional subsidies to quicken Rapidus Corp. into the intensely competitive AI chipmaking arena, ramping up financial support for a signature project widely regarded as a long shot.
articles.title_zh: 日本投入160億美元 推動新創公司Rapidus進軍AI晶片領域
articles.summary_zh: 日本批准向Rapidus Corp.提供6,315億日圓（40億美元）的額外補助金，以加速其進入競爭激烈的AI晶片製造市場，這是該標誌性項目的重大資金支持，該項目普遍被視為風險較高的賭注。

articles.title: The Artemis II mission has ended. Where does NASA go from here?
articles.summary: The Artemis era well and truly began Friday evening when a shiny spacecraft that had traveled 700,000 miles around the Moon, carrying four astronauts, splashed down in the Pacific Ocean off the coast of California. For NASA, for its international partners, and for all of humanity the successful conclusion of the Artemis II mission marked a return to deep space by our species after more than half a century. It was a spectacular achievement, and NASA deserves credit for making something what is very difficult look relatively easy. But it also raises an important question: What comes next? Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: Artemis II任務已結束 NASA的下一步何在？
articles.summary_zh: 週五晚間，一艘環繞月球往返70萬英里的閃亮太空船搭載四名宇航員在加州海岸外的太平洋濺落，標誌著Artemis時代真正開啟。對NASA、其國際夥伴及全人類而言，這次任務的成功圓滿完成。

articles.title: 攔阻影子AI有道！SailPoint提供基於瀏覽器外掛的企業管理框架
articles.summary: 為了提高工作效率，越來越多人在企業管理的環境當中，使用各種生成式AI服務，然而，也因此經常發生所謂的「影子AI」，也就是員工未獲得IT部門的許可而擅自使用AI，由於資安人員無法知曉他們如何與AI平臺互動，導致出現管理的盲點與失去狀態掌控的能力，針對這樣的管理需求，專攻身分治理解決方案的資安廠商SailPoint，今年3月下半宣布推出SailPoint Shadow AI Remediation（SAIR），提供即時AI治理與安全性框架，因應員工未經授權使用AI工具

articles.summary: A research team at Specops benchmarked an RTX 5090, against two AI datacenter GPUs with Hashcat to see which GPU is the better password cracker. Spoiler alert, the RTX 5090 was the winner.
articles.title_zh: 測試顯示 $30,000 AI GPU 破解密碼表現糟糕 — RTX 5090 遊戲 GPU 勝過 Nvidia H200 和 AMD MI300X
articles.summary_zh: Specops 研究團隊使用 Hashcat 對 RTX 5090 與兩款 AI 數據中心 GPU 進行基準測試，比較哪款 GPU 破解密碼效能更強，結果 RTX 5090 勝出。

articles.title: I’ve been a Kindle user for 10+ years — and I may never buy another one
articles.summary: A few days ago, Amazon emailed Kindle users to say that some older models are about to lose support. At first glance, it reads like routine housekeeping; devices age out all the time. But these e-readers aren’t breaking or struggling — they still do exactly what they’ve always done: download, store, and display books. There’s no obvious reason these devices should be any less useful tomorrow than they are today.
articles.title_zh: 我使用 Kindle 超過 10 年 — 我可能永遠不會再買一台
articles.summary_zh: Amazon 最近通知 Kindle 使用者某些舊型號將失去支援，儘管這些電子閱讀器仍能正常運作，但此舉引發了使用者的疑慮。

articles.title: I tried the redesigned Google Wallet app, and it fixes my 2 biggest complaints
articles.summary: It’s a big deal whenever Google redesigns one of its Android apps, and that’s especially true for an app as big as Google Wallet. We’ve been tracking evidence of a major Google Wallet update since as early as last September, and after months of waiting, it’s finally live. Google began rolling out its Wallet redesign on April 10, and after using it on my Pixel 10a for about a day, I can confirm that the new design was worth the wait. Here’s what it looks like in action.
articles.title_zh: 我試用了重新設計的 Google Wallet 應用程式，它解決了我最大的 2 個困擾
articles.summary_zh: Google 推出了期待已久的 Google Wallet 重大更新，此次改版針對該應用程式的主要問題進行了改進。

articles.title: Karpathy says developers have ‘AI Psychosis.’ Everyone else is next.
articles.summary: I’m Matt Burns, Chief Content Officer at Insight Media Group. Each week, I round up the most important AI developments, explaining what they mean for people and organizations putting this technology to work. The thesis is simple: workers who learn to use AI will define the next era of their industries, and this newsletter is here to help you be one of them. OpenAI co-founder Andrej Karpathy posted an essay this week describing a real and growing perception gap around AI. He’s right that it exists. But the reason it’s widest in software right now isn’t just about reinforcement learning and verifiable reward functions.  Developers are feeling AI’s impact first not because coding is the only domain where the tools work, and not because programmers are unique
articles.title_zh: Karpathy 表示開發者患有「AI 精神病」。其他人也將面臨
articles.summary_zh: Matt Burns 作為 Insight Media Group 首席內容官，每週總結最重要的 AI 發展動態，解釋這些技術對使用 AI 的人員和組織的意義。核心觀點是：學會使用 AI 的工作者將定義下一個時代。

articles.title: Original Apollo 11 code open-sourced by NASA — original Command Module and Lunar Module code repos are now public domain resources
articles.summary: The historic computer software code that took Apollo 11 to the moon has been open-sourced and is available to anyone to read, download, and tinker with.
articles.title_zh: NASA 開源原始 Apollo 11 程式碼 — 原始 Command Module 和 Lunar Module 程式碼儲存庫現已成為公共領域資源
articles.summary_zh: 將 Apollo 11 送上月球的歷史計算機軟體代碼已開源，任何人都可以查看、下載和修改。

articles.title: Garage sale haul finds 2013 'trash can' Mac Pro nestled inside 2010 Mac Pro enclosure — Mac Pro inception still needs some work to get running
articles.summary: A lucky buyer on Reddit found a 2010 Mac Pro in a garage sale and it had a whole 'nother 2013 Mac Pro sitting inside. The tower didn't have any internals, which implies that the owner was likely using it as a sort of DIY enclosure for the trash-can Mac Pro, to perhaps mount extra stuff since the 2013 Mac Pro has no expansion slots.
articles.title_zh: 車庫拍賣淘寶 2013 年「垃圾桶」Mac Pro 巢狀在 2010 年 Mac Pro 機殼內 — Mac Pro Inception 仍需調試才能正常運作
articles.summary_zh: 一位幸運的 Reddit 用戶在車庫拍賣中發現 2010 年 Mac Pro，其內部竟然裝著一台 2013 年 Mac Pro。該塔式電腦缺少內部零件，暗示前主人可能是在自製一個外殼來放置這台垃圾桶型 Mac Pro。

articles.summary_zh: 我們在多款 GPU 和筆記型電腦上測試了 RTX Neural Texture Compression 的性能。

articles.title: FAA courts gamers to become air traffic controllers — boasts $155k average annual salary after three years as the agency prepares for 8,000 applicants
articles.summary: The FAA's latest YouTube video is encouraging gamers to apply to become an air traffic controller, telling them that they've been training for this challenge. The agency is tapping on the younger demographic to help expand its numbers as the ATC shortage is hampering safety and airport operations.
articles.title_zh: FAA 招募遊戲玩家成為空中交通管制員 — 三年後平均年薪達 $155k，機構準備招聘 8,000 名申請者
articles.summary_zh: FAA 最新 YouTube 影片鼓勵遊戲玩家申請成為空中交通管制員，聲稱他們一直在為此做準備。該機構瞄準年輕族群以擴充人力，應對空管人員短缺對安全和機場運營的影響。

articles.title: I replaced my NAS with Google Drive for a month and barely noticed
articles.summary: I didn’t intend to do this experiment, but my month-long trip away from home forced me to shut down my NAS for a good few weeks. What I expected to be a temporary inconvenience ended up feeling… normal. The NAS is such an ingrained part of my local file access workflow that I assumed I’d miss it immediately, but with a portable SSD in my hand and Google Drive practically moving everywhere with me, I had little reason to think about my home setup at all. For the most part, everything just worked, although there were still a couple of moments where a local network storage solution would have been more suitable.
articles.title_zh: 我用Google Drive取代了NAS一個月，幾乎沒有察覺到差異
articles.summary_zh: 一次意外的NAS停機實驗讓我發現，Google Drive作為雲端儲存方案竟然能無縫取代我的本地NAS系統。這段經歷挑戰了我對NAS不可或缺的既有認知。

articles.title: iPadOS 26 multitasking is so bad that I’ve replaced my iPad with an Android tablet
articles.summary: It’s a tale as old as time. iPads are better productivity machines than Android tablets. At least, that’s what people want you to think. As an iPad owner (2020 iPad Pro 11) and a Galaxy Tab S10 Plus user, I think the opposite is true. Aside from one or two specific uses, I can get more done on my Tab S10 than I can on the iPad for one reason: iPadOS 26 sucks. It’s bad enough that, after five years of enjoyment, I hate using my iPad now. iPadOS 26 is a mess
articles.title_zh: iPadOS 26的多工處理如此糟糕，我已用Android平板取代了iPad
articles.summary_zh: 作為iPad Pro 11和Galaxy Tab S10 Plus用戶，我發現除了少數特定用途外，Android平板在生產力方面的表現實際上優於iPad。

articles.title: I’ve never had good luck with Pixels, but I decided to give them another chance
articles.summary: Credit: Ryan Haines / Android Authority Last month, I wrote about how I want to be a Pixel fan, but I’ve had pretty poor luck with the series over the years . Still, as Android 16 continues to evolve , I’ve admitted more than once that I’ve been tempted to give Pixels another try to experience the latest betas and more. Recently, I finally decided to pull the trigger and am once again a Pixel owner. This time around, I’ve decided to give its budget range a try, as my family has been very impressed with the Galaxy S25 FE , and so I was curious how Google’s own mid-ranger might compare. So far, I’ve been using the Pixel 10a for almost two weeks, and overall, I’m impressed.
articles.title_zh: 我對Pixel手機的運氣一直不好，但我決定再給它們一次機會
articles.summary_zh: 儘管過去對Pixel系列的體驗不佳，但隨著Android 16的持續演進，我決定重新嘗試Pixel手機以體驗其最新功能。

articles.title: AI models are terrible at betting on soccer—especially xAI Grok
articles.summary: AI models from Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic lost money betting on soccer matches over a Premier League season, in a new study suggesting even the most advanced systems struggle to analyze the real world over long periods. The “KellyBench” report released this week by AI start-up General Reasoning highlights the gap between AI’s rapidly advancing capabilities in certain tasks, such as writing software, and its shortcomings in other kinds of human problems. London-based General Reasoning tested eight top AI systems in a virtual re-creation of the 2023–24 Premier League season, providing them with detailed historical data and statistics about each team and previous games. The AIs were instructed to build models that would maximize returns and manage risk. Read full article Comments
articles.title_zh: AI 模型在足球賭博上表現糟糕——特別是 xAI Grok
articles.summary_zh: 來自 Google、OpenAI 和 Anthropic 的 AI 模型在英超聯賽賭球中虧損，一項新研究表明即使是最先進的系統也難以長期分析現實世界。
